text.title: Nomad Mode Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the Trip Mode Declaration and the daily 2h-window log. Founder must publish these before and during the trip respectively.

field.name: declaration.paused_ops
field.notes: must list each production-touching op explicitly

forbidden.pattern: declaration.paused_ops empty when the team operates a production deploy pipeline (paused must include deploys)
declaration.zero_work_days empty for a trip longer than 4 days
production deploy happened during trip window without an incident-justified override note
declaration.response_window_hours set to a value < 24 (defeats the mode)
trip_end_date earlier than trip_start_date OR window length < 1 day

allowed-transformations.transformation: Override a single zero-work day if (a) an actual paid customer incident requires intervention AND (b) the founder logs an override note. The mode is then re-anchored with a replacement zero-day in the next 3 calendar days.
Extend the daily window to 3-4 hours for a maximum of 2 days per trip if a pre-trip deliverable slipped; never as the default.

list.item: Trip Mode Declaration posted to team channel BEFORE departure
At least one zero-work day per 5 calendar days
Daily window does not exceed 4 hours on any single day
Deferred-deploy queue tagged in PRs, not held in memory
Post-trip update published within 72h of return
